title: Manage the production system
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage the production system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Integrate plans for different sectors of the enterprise

pcs.text: Examine strategic, production, infrastructure and land management plans to identify interactions between different sectors of the enterprise
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine strategic, production, infrastructure and land management plans to identify interactions between different sectors of the enterprise?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine strategic, production, infrastructure and land management plans to identify interactions between different sectors of the enterprise.

pcs.text: Determine types of interactions and the impacts on resources and production system performance over time
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine types of interactions and the impacts on resources and production system performance over time?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine types of interactions and the impacts on resources and production system performance over time.

pcs.text: Assess beneficial interactions and any potential additional benefits for further improvements to the system's efficiency
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess beneficial interactions and any potential additional benefits for further improvements to the system's efficiency?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess beneficial interactions and any potential additional benefits for further improvements to the system's efficiency.

pcs.text: Assess detrimental interactions and adjust the production system to minimise potential losses
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess detrimental interactions and adjust the production system to minimise potential losses?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess detrimental interactions and adjust the production system to minimise potential losses.

pcs.text: Obtain and discuss information on innovations for use in the organisation and integrate with operational plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and discuss information on innovations for use in the organisation and integrate with operational plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and discuss information on innovations for use in the organisation and integrate with operational plans.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Integrate plans for different sectors of the enterprise

elements.title: Develop and implement risk management strategies

pcs.text: Analyse the business to identify its strengths and weaknesses as well as any threats to, or opportunities to improve, the organisation's sustainability and profitability

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse the business to identify its strengths and weaknesses as well as any threats to, or opportunities to improve, the organisation's sustainability and profitability.

pcs.text: Consider potential results of threats in terms of natural resources, business assets and infrastructure

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider potential results of threats in terms of natural resources, business assets and infrastructure.

pcs.text: Develop preventative and reactive contingency plans to minimise threats and maximise opportunities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop preventative and reactive contingency plans to minimise threats and maximise opportunities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop preventative and reactive contingency plans to minimise threats and maximise opportunities.

pcs.text: Ensure contingency plans aim to ensure business stability and profitability while protecting and preserving natural resources and business assets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure contingency plans aim to ensure business stability and profitability while protecting and preserving natural resources and business assets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure contingency plans aim to ensure business stability and profitability while protecting and preserving natural resources and business assets.

pcs.text: Undertake whole-business physical and financial analyses to determine the long-term sustainability and profitability of the production system

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake whole-business physical and financial analyses to determine the long-term sustainability and profitability of the production system.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and discuss results of analyses with colleagues and stakeholders for input to future planning processes.
